description: An accountable listening output keeps covenant, position, apparatus, and claim evidence distinct. The example also exercises attributed absence and observe-only action authority.

heard.statement: A repeating granular sound appears against a quieter continuous layer.
heard.basis: Audio-native model observation, not source identification

measured.statement: The supplied file has two channels at 48000 Hz.

undetermined.statement: The producing source and capture location are not established by this listening.
undetermined.basis: No corroborating source or location evidence

what_remains_hidden: Producing source, listener embodiment, and the complete capture chain.

technical: The file was decoded and resampled by a local host.
spatial: Playback space and capture space are not known to be the same.
bodily: No listener-specific bodily response was collected.
computational: DSP and an audio model supplied different evidence streams.

hallucination: Do not complete the scene from resemblance.
over_identification: Do not identify a source from the granular quality alone.

listening_output.main_reading: The recording presents a repeating granular layer and a continuous background, with cause held open.
listening_output.alternative_reading: The apparent layers may partly result from capture, encoding, or model segmentation.

position.relation_to_object: remote analysis of a local file
limitations: The agent did not witness the recording event.

honest_absences.subject: location
honest_absences.note: The content is not reconstructed or guessed.
